title: WebSocket hook with connection management and message handling
purpose: Manages WebSocket connections in React components with automatic connection handling, message sending, and subscription management.
module_context: Exports a custom React hook 'useWebSocket' that provides WebSocket functionality with automatic connection lifecycle management and state tracking.

steps.content: Initialize WebSocket client reference and connection state.
Create a callback to get or create the WebSocket client instance.
Define a callback to establish a WebSocket connection with error handling.
Define a callback to terminate the WebSocket connection.
Define a callback to send messages through the WebSocket connection.
Define a callback to subscribe to channels on the WebSocket connection.
Define a callback to unsubscribe from channels on the WebSocket connection.
Setup connection event listeners and handle auto-connect on component mount.
Check if a WebSocket client instance already exists in the reference.
IF no client exists, create a new one using the provided URL or default client.
Return the existing or newly created WebSocket client instance.
Set the connection state to connecting and clear any previous errors.
Get the WebSocket client instance.
Attempt to establish a connection with the WebSocket server.
IF connection succeeds, update state to reflect connected status.
IF connection fails, capture the error and update state to reflect error status.
Get the WebSocket client instance.
Terminate the WebSocket connection.
Update connection state to reflect disconnected status.
Get the WebSocket client instance.
Send the provided message through the WebSocket connection.
Get the WebSocket client instance.
Subscribe to the specified channel on the WebSocket connection.
Get the WebSocket client instance.
Unsubscribe from the specified channel on the WebSocket connection.
